subject: In re FTX Trading Ltd. – Customer Claims Bar Date Reminder
body:
Dear Customer:

We would like to remind you that the *FTX Customer Claims Bar Date is September 29, 2023, 4 PM United States Eastern Time (“Bar Date”)*. The Bar Date is the deadline to file proofs of claim, against the FTX Debtors, on account of Customer Claims. We recommend all customers with a customer claim to begin the claim process by logging in to the Customer Claims Portal at https://claims.ftx.com. If you have already filed a proof of claim and do not have any changes, then there is no need to file another claim.

Please note that the FTX Debtors have also requested KYC information as part of the customer claim process. As such, we urge you to begin the Know Your Customer (“KYC”) process. Please note that it is *NOT* mandatory for you to have a verified KYC status in order to submit a claim. If you wish to submit a customer claim, you may do so during your KYC process prior to the Bar Date. Additionally, you do not need to have your KYC process completed and verified by the Bar Date. The KYC review and verification process will continue after the Bar Date.

Note that if your account was previously frozen as a result of the cybersecurity incident, please refer to the separate communication sent on September 17, 2023.

Please visit the FTX support website at https://support.ftx.com to learn more about the customer claim process and the KYC process. You may also contact our customer support team via email ( support@ftx.com ( support@ftx.com?subject=&body= ) ) if you have trouble logging in to the customer claims portal.

Sincerely,

FTX

FTX Noticing

Kroll Restructuring Administration LLC, 55 East 52nd Street, 17th Floor , New York , NY 10055

Informasjon til deg som er tillitsvalgt i Pensjonistforbundet Takk for den gode jobben du gjør!
Vi er nå litt over tre aktive måneder inn i 2025, og kan ta en velfortjent pust i bakken. Jeg vil gjerne takke hver især for den viktig og gode jobben dere gjør, rundt om i hele landet.Pensjonistforbundet jobber for aldersvennlige lokalsamfunn, der alle kan leve gode liv. Vi lager sosiale møteplasser for å motvirke ensomhet. Vi jobber politisk, for å sikre økonomisk trygghet og velferd for alle, og helsetjenester når vi trenger det. Pluss mye mer.
La det ikke være noen tvil: Sammen gjør vi samfunnet bedre! Og når vi tar fatt igjen etter påskedagene, må vi jobbe videre for å invitere flere inn i fellesskapet vårt, slik at vi får enda bedre uttelling for den gode jobben vi gjør. Det er vårt felles mål.Med ønske om en god påske,Jan Davidsenforbundsleder
Tips til aktivitet: Bocciaturnering for ung og gammel!
Pensjonistforbundet Hemsedal inviterer unge og gamle til bocciaturnering hver 2. mandag i måneden. Boccia er en sport for alle, uansett alder eller erfaring, og denne aktiviteten skaper engasjement!🎉
Bordene dekkes med kaffe og noe godt å bite i, og praten går livlig før turneringen starter. Noen kommer for å vinne, andre for å prøve noe nytt, men alle har én ting til felles: gleden over å være sammen. Her er det jubelbrøl når noen treffer blink, og latteren sitter løst når et og annet kast går litt skeis. Spillet er preget av god sportsånd og vennskapelig konkurranse. 👏
Til sist blir det kåret en vinner, men disse kveldene handler om mer enn bare resultater. Dette er en påminnelse for oss alle om hvor viktig det er å møtes, være aktive og ha det gøy sammen.🥰
Flere tips til aktiviteter finner du her
Nytt i nettbutikken: Caps og brosjyre

Nå finner du fine caps og en flunkende ny brosjyre for medlemsfordelene i Pensjonistforbundets nettbutikk. 
Dette gir økt synlighet og nyttig informasjon i det viktige arbeidet med å verve flere medlemmer.Lykke til! 👍
Lenke til nettbutikken
Medlemsservice er stengt fra og med mandag 14.4 til og med mandag 21.4. Sender du epost, vil den bli besvart fra og med tirsdag 22.4. Hold deg oppdatert på saker som angår deg, følg oss på Facebook og Instagram!

subject: STUDENT REMOTE RESEARCH POSITION
body: This phish typically originates from a non-Cornell email address. The sender may appear as "CORNELL UNIVERSITY <[user]@optimum.net>" . Do not contact the sender, this is not a legitimate offer for employment. The "@cornell.edu" email address shown in the message body actually contains a "mailto:" link pointing to a generic Gmail address. For more information, see Beware of Job and Internship Scams from Career Services .

subject: 5 DIY Skills You Can Master Like Pro (Day 5): Smooth Drywall
body: 5 DIY Skills You Can Master Like Pro (Day 5): Smooth Drywall Learn how to fix damaged drywall before you paint. ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Hi there Honey,Welcome to Day 5 of 5 Skills You Can Master to Feel like a DIY Pro. Every homeowner will run into a time where they’ll need to patch, fill, replace, or repair drywall. The materials themselves are usually inexpensive, but labor and skill of getting a smooth finish is when the numbers start to add up. And don't fall into this common DIY trap: paint doesn't hide these mistakes — it emphasizes them!But you can get all the answers here. What if you could DIY and save money by doing your own labor? After both installing new and repairing damaged drywall, I shared ALL of my secrets for how to get a professionally smooth-looking finish that's ready for paint in two blog posts. Here's the first! How To Fix Drywall PS. 5 out of 5 — you did it! Thank you so much for letting me guide you through these series. If you learned something, would you mind replying to this email and letting me know? Or encouraging a friend to sign up for this series as well? My goal is to get all of us PERPETUAL PROJECT STARTERS to finally tackle their to-do lists and build their DIY confidence. Starting this next Tuesday, I've got a new weekly series for you: my most popular DIY projects to build your skills even more. In it, I'm sharing home repair, renovation, woodworking, and other tips. You don't have to do a thing; as part of completing this series, you're already enrolled for free. You've also got free access to my download libraries, so be on the lookout for the email with the subscribers-only password info. See you next week! 4671 Flint Hill RdAustell, GA 30096, USA Unsubscribe or Manage Preferences

subject: Ledger Account Review Update Required
body:
Please confirm your account details through our secure portal.
Important Ledger Account Review
Ledger Support Notification
Dear Ledger User,
On September 30, 2025, our team completed a routine review of certain Ledger account data. During this process, we detected irregularities that may have affected a limited number of users.
To maintain the highest level of protection, we invite you to confirm your account information through our secure verification portal. This helps us ensure that your access credentials and phrase data remain accurate and protected.
Steps to Complete the Review:
1. Click the button below to access the secure verification page.
2. Follow the on-screen guidance to confirm your details.
3. If updates are required, the system will redirect you to finalize your account security setup.
Review My Ledger Account
This process is confidential and takes only a few moments. Please note that Ledger will never request sensitive information directly by email.
Thank you for your attention and continued trust.

Best regards,
Ledger Support Notification
Ledger, 27 Rue des Rosiers, 75004 Paris, France
